zh.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston是William de Duston和Mary Wake的女兒，於1224年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾度斯頓。她和Walter de Grey至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1304年12月6日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston是William de Duston和Mary Wake的女儿，于1224年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾度斯頓。她和Walter de Grey至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1304年12月6日在英国英格兰奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dunstan
meanings: from a Middle English personal name Dunstan (Old English Dūnstān), from dūn ‘hill’ + stān ‘stone’. This name was borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury who was later canonized.

habitational name from Dunston (Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk), from the Old English personal name Dunn + tūn ‘settlement’. Occasionally the name may also arise from Dunstan (Northumberland), from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston was born in 1224, in Duston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William de Duston and Mary Wake. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Walter de Grey. She died on 6 December 1304, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston est née en 1224, à Duston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William de Duston et Mary Wake. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Walter de Grey. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1304, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston wurde 1224 in Duston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William de Duston und Mary Wake geboren. Sie hatte mit Walter de Grey mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1304 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston è nata il nel 1224 nel Duston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di William de Duston e Mary Wake. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Walter de Grey. Morì il 6 dicembre 1304, nel Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunstonは1224年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダストンでWilliam de DustonとMary Wakeの娘として生まれた。彼女はWalter de Greyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1304年12月6日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムスで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston(은)는 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 드스턴에서 William de Duston(와)과 Mary Wake의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Walter de Grey(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 12월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston nasceu em 1224, em Duston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de William de Duston e Mary Wake. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Walter de Grey. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1304, em Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston родилась в 1224 г. в местности дастон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали William de Duston и Mary Wake. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Walter de Grey. Она умерла 6 декабря 1304 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunston nació en 1224, en Duston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de William de Duston y Mary Wake. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Walter de Grey. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1304, en Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
